sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Citizens’ Coughlin talks ‘overwhelming’ pace of AI change
feed.summary: Brendan Coughlin, President of Citizens, discussed the "overwhelming" pace of AI advancements as the bank is six months into its "Reimagine the Bank" initiative. He emphasized the need for banks to abandon the old mindset of setting plans for five years due to how rapidly AI tools become obsolete. Citizens is leveraging AI to transform operations, targeting $450 million in benefits by the end of 2028, with a significant focus on improving call center and engineering productivity.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Southwest Airlines (LUV) Dropping Fuel Hedges As Jet-Fuel Costs Surge
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines ended its fuel hedging program in early 2026, coinciding with a significant surge in jet-fuel prices, leaving the company more exposed to high operating costs. This move raises questions about Southwest's cost structure compared to competitors like Delta and could impact its near-term margins. Investors need to consider how the airline will offset these increased costs through new revenue initiatives and operational efficiencies, despite a solid balance sheet.

feed.title: Allogene Therapeutics advances CAR T therapy to expand access for patients
feed.summary: Allogene Therapeutics is making strides in CAR T therapy, aiming to revolutionize patient care through innovative cell therapy developments. The company is focused on improving access to advanced treatments and holds promise for patients with severe autoimmune diseases. This includes the introduction of ALLO-329, a next-generation CAR-T therapy utilizing its Dagger technology platform.

feed.title: Michigan grid plan approved to cut outages for 2 million customers
feed.summary: Consumers Energy (NYSE:CMS) has received approval from the Michigan Public Service Commission for its 2026 Reliability Action Plan, which aims to strengthen the electric grid for nearly 2 million homes and businesses. The plan allocates 75 cents of every customer dollar to grid improvements, including tree trimming, line burial, stronger poles, and enhanced security measures. This investment is projected to reduce outage times and build upon a 28% decrease in outages since 2021, with Consumers Energy also providing $5 million to nonprofits for bill assistance.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Announces Promotions
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) has announced significant leadership changes, promoting Alexander J. Jessett to CEO, Laurie A. Baker to President and COO, and Benjamin D. Fraker to Executive Vice President – CFO and Treasurer. Co-founder Richard J. Campo will now serve as Executive Chairman, while co-founder D. Keith Oden continues as Executive Vice Chairman. These promotions align with the company's long-term succession plan, aiming to ensure strong leadership for future growth.

feed.title: Zacks.com featured highlights include Gold Fields, Adecoagro, Strategic Education and ZTO Express Cayman
feed.summary: This article identifies four high-growth GARP (Growth at a Reasonable Price) stocks with attractive PEG ratios: Gold Fields (GFI), Adecoagro (AGRO), Strategic Education (STRA), and ZTO Express Cayman (ZTO). It discusses the GARP investing strategy, which combines growth and value principles, and explains how a low PEG ratio can indicate both undervaluation and future growth potential for these companies. Each featured stock is highlighted for its strong Zacks Rank, Value Score, and impressive historical or expected growth rates.

feed.title: Coca-Cola HBC Discloses Vesting of Executive Performance Share Award
feed.summary: Coca-Cola HBC has disclosed the vesting of a performance share award for its Chief People and Culture Officer, Toon Iman Paul van der Veer. A total of 15,120 treasury shares were transferred to the executive after performance conditions were met on March 25, 2026. To cover tax liabilities, 805 of these shares were sold on the London Stock Exchange at approximately £42.82 each, demonstrating the company's commitment to equity-based incentives and regulatory transparency.

feed.title: Advantage Solutions (NASDAQ:ADV) Hits Yearly High Amid Nasdaq Composite Rally
feed.summary: Advantage Solutions (NASDAQ:ADV) has reached a new yearly high, driven by increased trading activity and positive movement in the Nasdaq Composite. The article indicates strong market engagement for the company, with its valuation and growth influenced by operational performance, market positioning, and demand for its integrated sales and marketing services. Volatility is linked to trading activity and broader market conditions.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc's top executives are weighing buying another bank - Bloomberg News
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc.'s top executives are reportedly considering the acquisition of another bank, as revealed by Bloomberg News. This news comes amidst other recent updates for the company, including an analyst price target reduction from Oppenheimer and coverage initiation with a 'Buy' rating from Jefferies.

feed.title: Janus Henderson Forty Fund’s Updates on Eli Lilly and Company (LLY)
feed.summary: Janus Henderson Forty Fund released its Q4 2025 investor letter, highlighting Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) as a significant contributor. The pharmaceutical giant saw strong performance driven by its GLP-1 weight loss products, Mounjaro and Zepbound, and promising pipeline drugs. Despite LLY's strong 2025 results, the fund suggests AI stocks may offer higher and quicker returns for investors.

feed.title: TJ Maxx affiliate store opening in Hoover shopping center
feed.summary: Sierra Trading Post, a retail brand specializing in outdoor and lifestyle products, is set to open its first Alabama location in Hoover. The brand is a subsidiary of the same parent company that owns and operates HomeGoods and TJ Maxx. This expansion marks a new retail offering for the Hoover shopping center.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc's Top Executives Are Weighing Buying Another Bank- Bloomberg News
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc.'s top executives are reportedly considering the acquisition of another bank, according to Bloomberg News. This information comes from a Refinitiv report, indicating potential merger and acquisition activity for the financial giant. The news piece is very brief, highlighting this significant development.

feed.title: CFO at AAR CORP (AIR) receives grant of 7,580 shares
feed.summary: AAR CORP's Senior VP & CFO, Dylan Zachary Wolin, was granted 7,580 restricted shares of common stock, which were issued at no cash cost under a compensation plan. This transaction, exempt under Rule 16b-3, increases his direct holding to 7,580 shares. The filing indicates a routine executive equity award rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, a wholly-owned finance subsidiary of JPMorgan Chase & Co., is issuing Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the MerQube US Large-Cap Vol Advantage Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes offer contingent interest payments if the Index level meets a specified barrier and can be automatically called if the Index reaches its initial value. Investors face risks including potential principal loss and the impact of a daily deduction on the Index’s performance.

feed.title: Amazon.com Inc (AMZN) Shares Down 3.13% on Mar 27
feed.summary: Amazon.com Inc (AMZN) shares fell 3.13% on March 27, reaching an intraday low of $200.27 before closing slightly higher at $201.05. Despite the dip, analysts forecast an average target price of $279.52, implying a 39.03% upside, with a consensus "Outperform" rating. GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $250.47, suggesting a 24.58% upside from the current price.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] PROGRESSIVE CORP/OH/ Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amended Schedule 13G/A for Progressive Corporation (PGR), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of the class. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where several Vanguard subsidiaries began reporting their ownership separately. The amendment clarifies that The Vanguard Group no longer has beneficial ownership over securities held by these disaggregated units, consistent with SEC Release No. 34-39538.

feed.title: Caesars Casino Bonus Code ROTOCASLAUNCH in March: Score $1k & 2.5K Rewards Credits
feed.summary: This article details the Caesars Palace Online Casino bonus code "ROTOCASLAUNCH" for March 2026, offering new users a 100% deposit match up to $1,000, plus a $10 no-deposit bonus and 2,500 reward points. It outlines the terms and conditions, eligible states, payment methods, and other promotions like bonus spins and a refer-a-friend program. Additionally, it highlights the Caesars Rewards loyalty program and responsible gambling features available on the platform.

feed.title: -3.14% for UnitedHealth stock as persistent bearish momentum drives fresh lows
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) stock declined 3.14% to $259.64, trading below key moving averages and indicating persistent bearish momentum due to regulatory and legal challenges. Analysts project a single-digit profit decline and $110.08 billion in sales for the upcoming quarter. Technical indicators confirm the bearish trend, with a high probability of further downside in the short term unless the stock decisively breaks above $281.

feed.title: Higher oil prices could revive U.S. shale drilling in 2026, Citi says
feed.summary: Citigroup analysts predict that rising oil prices, fueled by the Middle East conflict, could lead to a resurgence in U.S. shale drilling. Public and private producers combined could add 815,000 bpd of crude to the global market by 2028, with an initial increase of over 100,000 bpd by 2027 from major shale players. This optimistic outlook is based on the forward oil price curve, which now shows prices above $70 a barrel, a significant shift from pre-war fears of a global crude glut.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Gartner, Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) alleging securities fraud on behalf of investors who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit claims Gartner made misleading statements regarding its expected contract value growth, projected revenues, and the performance of its consulting segment. Investors are encouraged to join the case by May 18, 2026, to potentially recover damages.

feed.title: American Airlines Flight Attendants Fear Bankruptcy — Internal Union Minutes Call Finances "Dire"
feed.summary: American Airlines flight attendants are reportedly concerned about the airline's financial situation, fearing potential bankruptcy could jeopardize their contracts and wage gains. Internal union minutes from February 2026 describe the company's financial state as "dire" amid lukewarm performance compared to competitors and rising costs due to global events. While acknowledging no imminent bankruptcy risk, the article details several strategic missteps by American Airlines that contribute to its struggles, including fleet decisions, aircraft layout, service model, and over-financialization.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams stock slides as Middle East conflict pressures production costs
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) shares fell nearly 12% due to investor concerns over rising oil prices and their potential impact on production costs. The company's management has indicated they may be forced to raise prices if raw material costs continue to climb as a result of the Middle East conflict. This situation highlights the vulnerability of paint manufacturers to geopolitical events affecting commodity prices.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt: Higher Fuel Prices In Focus Ahead Of Q1 (NASDAQ:JBHT)
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt is expected to report its Q1 earnings soon, which will provide insights into how rising fuel prices are impacting transportation companies. Despite oil market volatility, the trucking company's shares have performed well. However, the author advises caution against chasing the stock before earnings, citing concerns about potential unfavorable guidance revisions and current fair valuation.

feed.title: Starbucks Stock Plunges Nearly 4% as Investors Question Pace of Turnaround Amid Persistent Challenges
feed.summary: Starbucks shares fell nearly 4% as investors raised concerns about the pace of its turnaround strategy amidst rising labor costs, store redesign expenses, and a volatile market. Despite early signs of progress like improved comparable-store sales and transaction growth, analysts are wary of near-term margin pressures and intensifying competition. CEO Brian Niccol's "Back to Starbucks" plan aims to restore the company's identity and profitability, but skepticism about its speed and effectiveness persists.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Prologis (PLD) shows 0 shares reported by Vanguard
feed.summary: Vanguard's recent Schedule 13G/A amendment for Prologis Inc. (PLD) indicates that The Vanguard Group now reports 0 shares beneficially owned of Prologis common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will report their ownership separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, signed the filing on March 27, 2026, clarifying that the change reflects a shift in reporting structure rather than a sale of shares, with Vanguard no longer deemed to beneficially own securities held by these disaggregated units.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Overhauls Board in Elliott-Backed Deal
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has announced a significant board overhaul, including the appointment of five new independent directors and the expansion of its board to nine members, eight of whom are independent. This move follows a cooperation agreement with Elliott Investment Management, NCLH's largest investor, and aims to improve governance, execution, and shareholder value. CEO John W. Chidsey has been named chairman, while Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, currently rates NCLH as "Neutral" due to high leverage and uneven free cash flow, despite strong post-pandemic recovery.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) prices $15.689M callable notes due 2029
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE: GS) is offering $15.689 million in callable fixed-rate notes due 2029, paying an annual interest of 4.55%, payable semi-annually. The company has the option to redeem the notes quarterly starting March 27, 2027, at 100% of the principal plus accrued interest. The offering price to the public is 100%, with an underwriting discount of 0.609%, and settlement is scheduled for March 27, 2026.

feed.title: Craig-Hallum cuts WhiteFiber stock price target on near-term noise
feed.summary: Craig-Hallum has reduced its price target for WhiteFiber Inc (NASDAQ:WYFI) from $25.00 to $21.00, while maintaining a Buy rating. The firm acknowledges near-term challenges impacting the stock but anticipates gains within the next couple of quarters, citing strong demand in AI data center and GPU-as-a-Service markets. This update follows WhiteFiber's significant Q4 2025 earnings miss, though Citizens reiterated a Market Outperform rating on the company's infrastructure progress.

feed.title: Honeywell expands security portfolio in bid to catch AI wave
feed.summary: Honeywell is expanding its security and access controls portfolio by partnering with Rhombus to integrate AI-powered video analytics into its existing platforms. This move addresses the surging demand for AI in building management, with a recent survey indicating 85% of building managers plan to increase AI use to improve threat detection and operational efficiency. The partnership allows customers to enhance their current systems with cloud-based AI solutions rather than requiring a complete overhaul.

feed.title: Allot Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
feed.summary: Allot (NASDAQ: ALLT) (TASE: ALLT) announced the filing of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This report, including audited financial statements, is accessible on the SEC's website and Allot's investor relations website. Shareholders can also request a hard copy free of charge.

feed.title: Humana is the worst performing large-cap healthcare stock YTD (XLV:NYSEARCA)
feed.summary: Humana is identified as the worst-performing large-cap healthcare stock year-to-date in 2026, even as the sector shows modest gains. The article highlights that large-cap healthcare stocks are generally performing steadily due to their defensive appeal. A list of the top 10 worst-performing stocks in this sector will be provided, ranked by their YTD performance as of late March 2026.

feed.title: Spotting the Signs of ATTR-CM: Latest Data Reveals Opportunities for More Timely Detection
feed.summary: New real-world data presented at the American College of Cardiology (ACC) Scientific Sessions highlights opportunities for earlier detection of transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy (ATTR-CM), a rare and underdiagnosed cause of heart failure. The research, supported by Pfizer, shows that many patients are initially misdiagnosed with other heart conditions and that common musculoskeletal "red flag" symptoms often appear years before an ATTR-CM diagnosis. Pfizer emphasizes that earlier detection is crucial for better long-term management and improved patient outcomes, and aims to continue advancing the science and clinical recognition of ATTR-CM.

feed.title: Allot posts audited 2025 financial statements in SEC annual filing
feed.summary: Allot (NASDAQ: ALLT) filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on March 27, 2026. This filing includes the company’s audited financial statements, confirming previously reported strong FY2025 revenues of $102.0M and a return to GAAP profitability with a net income of $3.7M. The report is available on the SEC website and Allot's investor relations site, with hard copies provided to shareholders upon request.

feed.title: Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. (NYSE:AMBP) Receives Average Recommendation of "Hold" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. (NYSE:AMBP) has received an average "Hold" rating from seven analysts, with an average 1-year price target of $4.51. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of $0.03, beating estimates, and revenue increased by 12.6% to $1.35 billion. While Ardagh declared a quarterly dividend of $0.10, indicating a 9.7% yield, concerns about its sustainability arise due to a deeply negative payout ratio.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] REPUBLIC SERVICES, INC. Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amended Passive Investment Disclosure (Schedule 13G/A, Amendment No. 8) for Republic Services Inc. This filing indicates that Vanguard now reports 0 shares beneficially owned, representing 0% of the class. The change is due to an internal realignment within The Vanguard Group effective January 12, 2026, which disaggregates holdings of certain subsidiaries and business divisions to be reported separately in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538.

feed.title: Micron's SSD Growth Drives NAND Revenues: Will it Sustain Momentum?
feed.summary: Micron Technology (MU) is experiencing significant growth in its NAND business, primarily due to strong demand for its solid-state drive (SSD) solutions, especially from data centers utilizing AI workloads. The company reported a 169% year-over-year increase in NAND revenues to $5 billion in Q2 fiscal 2026, driven by higher average selling prices and increased market share in SSDs. With competitors like Sandisk and Seagate also expanding their NAND and SSD offerings, and the industry facing an HDD shortage, Micron is well-positioned for sustained revenue growth, with analysts projecting a 178% year-over-year growth in NAND revenues for fiscal 2026.

feed.title: What is behind Moderna stock's recent drop in value today
feed.summary: Moderna Inc. (MRNA) experienced a 4.91% intraday drop, trading at $50.94, despite advancing its mRNA pipeline with phase 3 data for flu-COVID and personalized cancer vaccines expected in 2026. While technical indicators show short-term selling pressure, the stock remains above its 50-day and 200-day moving averages, suggesting medium- and long-term bullish momentum. Experts offer mixed opinions, with some noting instability due to the recent decline and others emphasizing ongoing growth potential from strategic partnerships and promising pipelines.

feed.title: Buy 2 Energy Drink Stocks to Stabilize Your Portfolio Returns in 2026
feed.summary: The article recommends two energy drink stocks, The Coca-Cola Co. (KO) and Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP), to stabilize investment portfolios in 2026. Both companies benefit from strong brands, innovation, and strategic execution in a growing market for energy and wellness beverages. The report highlights their individual growth prospects, positive analyst outlooks, and potential for steady returns despite industry challenges.

feed.title: THE FRIDAY 5: Dollar General Taps Ahold Delhaize Exec as New CEO; Kroger Reveals Retail Media Partnership With Google
feed.summary: This edition of The Friday 5 covers major news in the food retail industry, including JJ Fleeman's transition from Ahold Delhaize USA to Dollar General as its new CEO and Kroger's partnership with Google for SKU-level YouTube ad reporting. Other key stories include Walmart and Vizio's retail media push with a unified login, Harps Food Stores' expansion into Tennessee and Kentucky via an 18-store acquisition, and Albertsons Media Collective advocating for standardized iROAS measurement in retail media.

feed.title: Vanguard amends Schedule 13G; reports 0% stake in Regions Financial (RF)
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G, reporting 0% beneficial ownership in Regions Financial (RF) due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This administrative change means Vanguard's subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing explicitly states Vanguard no longer has sole or shared voting and dispositive power over RF shares.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 shares of Regeneron (REGN)
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which causes certain Vanguard subsidiaries to disaggregate and report their holdings separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. While Vanguard itself now reports no beneficial ownership, subsidiary filings may reveal previous holdings.

feed.title: Vanguard amends 13G/A for PulteGroup (PHM) after internal realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 13 to a Schedule 13G/A for PulteGroup Inc. (PHM), reporting 0% beneficial ownership due to an internal realignment. This realignment, under SEC Release No. 34-39538, means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately. As a result, Vanguard Group Inc. no longer has deemed beneficial ownership over these securities.

feed.title: Biogen Hybrozyme Deal Links Subcutaneous Biologics Push With Valuation Gap
feed.summary: Biogen has signed an exclusive license agreement with Alteogen for its Hybrozyme (ALT-B4) technology, focusing on developing subcutaneous versions of two biologic drugs with an option for a third. This collaboration aims to enhance patient convenience and accessibility by shifting biologics to at-home subcutaneous administration. While Biogen's stock has shown recent positive momentum with a 7.4% year-to-date increase, its valuation is considered approximately 50.2% below its estimated fair value by Simply Wall St models.

feed.title: Vanguard discloses zero ownership in Realty Income (NYSE: O) after realignment
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Realty Income (NYSE: O), reporting zero beneficial ownership and 0% of common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which disaggregated certain subsidiaries' holdings from The Vanguard Group, allowing them to report separately. The filing confirms that no single other person holds more than 5% of the class among the reported accounts.

feed.title: Vanguard (DGX) amends 13G, reports 0 shares after Jan 12, 2026 realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group amended its Schedule 13G filing for Quest Diagnostics Inc. (DGX), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of the class as of March 13, 2026. This amendment follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which allows certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions to report their holdings separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. This is an administrative disclosure reflecting changes in reporting structure rather than a change in investment.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Revvity (RVTY) filing shows 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Revvity (RVTY), disclosing 0 shares beneficially owned, representing 0% of the common stock. This filing indicates an internal realignment within Vanguard, where certain subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as permitted by SEC Release No. 34-39538. The amendment clarifies a change in reporting structure rather than a change in underlying share counts.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment; RJF ownership now 0% (RJF)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amendment (Schedule 13G/A) stating it now holds 0% beneficial ownership of Raymond James Financial Inc. (RJF) common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where Vanguard's subsidiaries and business divisions will now report their ownership separately, in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538. Investors interested in specific holdings will need to consult subsequent filings from these individual reporting entities.

feed.title: Vanguard realigns reporting; subsidiaries to report REG holdings (REG)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G for Regency Centers Corp (REG), reporting zero beneficial ownership following an internal realignment. This amendment indicates that certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their ownership separately, relying on SEC Release No. 34-39538. Previously held securities deemed beneficially owned by The Vanguard Group will now be disclosed by these disaggregated entities.

feed.title: BMO (BERZ) offers auto-callable notes with ≥10.70% contingent coupon
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) is offering new auto-callable Senior Medium-Term Notes (Series K) linked to the performance of the iShares Expanded Tech-Software ETF (IGV), Dow Jones Industrial Average (INDU), and Russell 2000 (RTY). These notes provide monthly contingent coupons of at least 10.70% per annum if the lowest performing underlying index is at or above 65% of its starting value. The securities also feature an automatic call option and expose investors to potential principal loss if not called and the lowest performing underlying falls below 65% of its starting value at maturity.

feed.title: Vanguard (PWR) Amends Ownership Filing, Reports 0 Shares After Realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Quanta Services Inc. (PWR), reporting 0 beneficial shares and 0% ownership following an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026. This realignment means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, and The Vanguard Group itself no longer claims beneficial ownership over those securities. The filing specifies that the change is in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538, and a full SEC filing document is provided detailing the amendment.
